SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.esql

Class NSqlCommand

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.esql.AbstractNSqlCommand
com.nib.commons.esql.NSqlCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
Direct Known Subclasses:
NSqlCursor
public class NSqlCommand extends AbstractNSqlCommand
NSqlCommand class extends AbstractNSqlCommand and provides methods to prepare and execute SQL commands.

  • Field Summary

    command, inHostVars, into, outHostVars, set, sqlca, values, where

  • Constructor Details

    • NSqlCommand

      public NSqlCommand(Sqlca sqlca)
      Constructor for NSqlCommand class.
      Parameters:
      sqlca - The Sqlca object used to store SQL return codes and messages.

  • Method Details

    • prepare

      public PreparedStatement prepare() throws SQLException
      This method is used to prepare the SQL command. It creates a new PreparedStatement object with the provided command and host variables. It sets the parameters of the PreparedStatement object to the values of the host variables.
      Returns:
      The PreparedStatement object created with the provided command and host variables.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If an error occurs while preparing the SQL command.

    • execute

      public void execute()
      This method is used to execute the SQL command. It prepares the SQL command, executes it, and reads the output host variables if any. It sets the return code and message in the Sqlca object based on the result of the execution.
      Specified by:
      execute in class AbstractNSqlCommand

    • close

      public void close()
      This method is used to close the SQL command. It sets the PreparedStatement object to null.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Specified by:
      close in class AbstractNSqlCommand

    • prepareParms

      protected void prepareParms(PreparedStatement cmd, NHostVariablesList vars) throws SQLException
      Prepares parameters for the SQL command.
      Parameters:
      cmd - PreparedStatement object
      vars - NHostVariablesList object
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs

    • set

      public void set(AbstractNField... intoFields)
      Sets the fields for the SQL command.
      Parameters:
      intoFields - Array of AbstractNField objects

    • where

      public void where(AbstractNField... intoFields)
      Sets the WHERE clause fields for the SQL command.
      Parameters:
      intoFields - Array of AbstractNField objects

    • values

      public void values(AbstractNField... intoFields)
      Sets the values for the SQL command.
      Parameters:
      intoFields - Array of AbstractNField objects

    • into

      public void into(AbstractNField... intoFields)
      Sets the INTO clause fields for the SQL command.
      Parameters:
      intoFields - Array of AbstractNField objects

    • readHostVariables

      protected void readHostVariables(ResultSet r, NHostVariablesList intos) throws SQLException, NSqlException
      Reads host variables from the ResultSet.
      Parameters:
      r - ResultSet object
      intos - NHostVariablesList object
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs
      NSqlException - if a SQL error occurs

    • getBinaryValue

      protected byte[] getBinaryValue(Object value)
      Gets the binary value of the object.
